planes: contract · governed modules: 2 · ungoverned: 0

  • [contract.additive-api] src/checkout (src/checkout/routes.ts:30) — module src/checkout's api contract adds optional GET /orders#nickname at src/checkout/routes.ts:30 — run `grip ratify contract src/checkout` to record it as part of the baseline once consumers are ready.
